title: cyanea spathulata
intro: Cyanea spathulata, also known as the Hawaiian hibiscus or naupaka, is a species of flowering plant native to Hawaii. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used to support heart health, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote digestion. Cyanea spathulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
